name: Operational AI
goal: Maximize precision, recall, and F1 using current datasets only.

feature_metadata.station_load: incident count per police station from training split
feature_metadata.station_closure_rate: cross-fold closure target encoding by police station
feature_metadata.zone_closure_rate: cross-fold closure target encoding by zone

high_priority_incident_prediction.selection_metric: best threshold F1, then precision, recall, ROC-AUC

duration_bucket_prediction.target: Short=0-30 mins, Medium=30-90 mins, Long=90+ mins

feature_metadata.station_load: incident count per police station from training split
feature_metadata.station_closure_rate: cross-fold closure target encoding by police station
feature_metadata.zone_closure_rate: cross-fold closure target encoding by zone

corridor_risk_classification.target: Historical corridor risk label: Low, Medium, High, Critical
corridor_risk_classification.note: Risk labels are generated from historical aggregate statistics.
